'''bachaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grabhook|grabhook]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grabhook|grabhook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bachaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæchæhæth|bæchæhæth]] || [[word:bæchæhæj|bæchæhæj]] || [[word:bæchæhæsh|bæchæhæsh]] || [[word:bæchæhæ|bæchæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachachahath|bachachahath]] || [[word:bachachahaj|bachachahaj]] || [[word:bachachahash|bachachahash]] || [[word:bachachaha|bachachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachahath|bachahath]] || [[word:bachahaj|bachahaj]] || [[word:bachahash|bachahash]] || [[word:bachaha|bachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachafhath|bachafhath]] || [[word:bachafhaj|bachafhaj]] || [[word:bachafhash|bachafhash]] || [[word:bachafhaf|bachafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bachahatha|bachahatha]] || [[word:bachahaja|bachahaja]] || [[word:bachahasha|bachahasha]] || [[word:bachahaka|bachahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bachahath|bachahath]] || [[word:bachahaj|bachahaj]] || [[word:bachahash|bachahash]] || [[word:bachaha|bachaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bachahathal|bachahathal]] || [[word:bachahajal|bachahajal]] || [[word:bachahashal|bachahashal]] || [[word:bachahakal|bachahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bachahathatha|bachahathatha]] || [[word:bachahajaja|bachahajaja]] || [[word:bachahashasha|bachahashasha]] || [[word:bachahaka|bachahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bachahathan|bachahathan]] || [[word:bachahajan|bachahajan]] || [[word:bachahashan|bachahashan]] || [[word:bachahakan|bachahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bachahathaoro|bachahathaoro]] || [[word:bachahajaoro|bachahajaoro]] || [[word:bachahashaoro|bachahashaoro]] || [[word:bachahakaoro|bachahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
